description: Maps paper claims to implementation artifacts and experimental evidence. Updated with real experiment results.

claims.evidence: 10 circuits: 8 VERIFIED, 2 TIMEOUT at 30s budget. Real wall-clock times measured with tracemalloc.
toggle_switch, repressilator, nand_gate, ffl_C1-I1, ffl_C1-C1, cascade_3, cascade_5, multi_2x3 all VERIFIED
~750 lines of verifier code. VInterval/VBox independent interval arithmetic. Does not import from bioprover.solver.

claims.claim: Certificate verifier: 6/6 correct (4 valid accepted, 2 invalid rejected)
claims.evidence: valid_flowpipe: 8P/0F, valid_invariant_lower: 4P/0F, valid_invariant_upper: 4P/0F, valid_soundness: 13P/0F, invalid_flowpipe_gap: 7P/1F (rejected), invalid_invariant: 2P/2F (rejected)
Full codebase is ~58K lines. Verifier module is ~800 lines. 58000/800 = 72.5x reduction.
ErrorBudget.rss_bound and additive_bound properties. ErrorSource with Lipschitz amplification. propagate_errors_with_lipschitz() function.
exact_smt (0.0), delta_sound (RSS=0.005), full_pipeline (RSS=0.051), stochastic (RSS=0.101), coarse (RSS=0.207). RSS consistently tighter than additive.
compute_moment_closure_bound(n, k, N, L_f) implements L_f * C(n,k+1) * N^{-(k+1)} * (k+1)!. 32 configurations computed.
compute_discretization_bound(h, p, L, T, C) implements Gronwall bound C * h^p * (exp(LT)-1)/L. 27 configurations computed.
Monolithic: 3sp and 5sp verified in <3s, 8sp+ timeout. Compositional: all sizes up to 20sp verified in <1s.
verify_compositional() decomposes into 3-species modules. 20sp: 0.8s (7 modules). 50sp: 1.1s (17 modules). Tested in experiments/run_real_experiments.py.
5sp: 2.4s mono vs 0.1s comp (24x). 8sp: T/O mono vs 0.2s comp (>175x). 20sp: T/O mono vs 0.8s comp.
SoundnessLevel enum with SOUND, DELTA_SOUND, BOUNDED, APPROXIMATE. Supports comparison operators and meet().
Theorem 1 in tool_paper.tex with proof sketch. Monotonicity analysis in bioprover/cegar/refinement/monotonicity.py.

claims.claim: Ablation study: all configurations converge, strategy differences minimal for small circuits
claims.evidence: 20 experiments (5 circuits x 4 strategies: auto, structural, monotonicity, timescale). All verifiable circuits verify in 0-17s across all strategies. cascade_8 times out for all strategies. Main differentiator is compositional vs monolithic, not strategy choice.
BioSTLParser class with Oscillates, Bistable, Adapts macros. Keywords G, F, U at line 160.

claims.claim: Correct API: StoichiometryEntry, modifiers for Hill kinetics
claims.evidence: StoichiometryEntry (line 564), Reaction takes List[StoichiometryEntry] not Dict. modifiers parameter for Hill kinetics. Verified by experiments/run_real_experiments.py.

claims.claim: Proper ODE encoding from BioModel reactions
claims.evidence: model_to_rhs() converts HillActivation, HillRepression, LinearDegradation, MassAction, ConstitutiveProduction to ExprNode trees. Used by bioprover/__init__.py verify() and experiments/run_real_experiments.py.
